prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPKO-DANCEDINO-JQ2210-PARENT Product Type: TOY_FIGURE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Remote Dino RC Walking Dinosaur Kids Toy With Lights and Sounds, 2 Colors Description: Dominate the prehistoric world with the remote radio control Jurassic Rex RC Dinosaur.

This 11" RC Dinosaur comes with a multi-function remote that allows you to control this predator's movements including forward function, fast forward function, dance function, and stop function.

Watch this carnivorous beast come to life with awesome sounds and light up spikes on his back that set him apart from the competition.

The Jurassic Rex RC Dinosaur is the perfect gift for kids over 3 years old. Order yours before our inventory goes extinct. Search Terms: Robot Dinosaur ryans rc toys dinosaur toy gift radio control remote christmas 2022 stocking stuffer for boys Features: - MULTI FUNCTION CONTROL - Make your dino dance, fight, and walk at different speeds with the durable and easy to use remote coltroller - LIGHTS UP & ROARS - Bright neon colors flash on this 11 inch predator's head, back, and tail and it lets out prehistoric hunting yell that will make its prey run for cover - HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL - Made of Durable Plastic Ideal for Indoor or Outdoor Play; Requires 5 AA Batteries (Not Included) - EDUCATIONAL TOY - Dinosaur T-Rex Predator Toy Teaches Kids About Mesozoic Era; Iconic Rex Spikes, Arms and Feet - CHILD SIZED - Dinosaur is 11" Tall; Ideal Size for Young Kids; Safe for Children Ages 3 and Up === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio Remote Control Walking Dinosaur RC Toy
